_comment: Optional QoS map: topic-glob -> scheduler lane. Copy this file to qos.rules.json to enable. First match wins. Lanes: command|sensor|default|bulk. A '#' in a pattern matches '<topic>#<type>' so you can classify by message type. This only sets the SERVER DEFAULT for a topic; a client's declared QoS still overrides it. dimoscope reads the '_comment' key harmlessly (only 'topic' + 'lane' are used).
